_comment: Hand-picked cases for the advisory A/B/C/D experiment. Fill source_run with the /tmp/defender-runs directory we draw alert.json from. gold is the hand-labeled disposition (NOT the disposition the original run produced — that's agent-generated). predicted_relevance is our prior on whether advisory would help; we measure whether the experiment confirms it.

positives.rationale: PLACEHOLDER — replace with the actual reason this case needs precedent (e.g. 'original run took 4 loops to land on cmdb-source-ip-lookup; corpus shows it as the discriminating lead from loop 1').

negatives.rationale: PLACEHOLDER — replace with the reason advisory is not expected to help (e.g. 'monitoring-probe shape; gather-the-source-IP enrichment resolves it on loop 1 regardless of precedent').
